title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The Trust Problem That Could Doom Smartglasses And AI Adoption
items.description: Backlash against smartglasses and AI is rooted in a lack of trust — and failing to solve for it may doom adoption of these new technologies.

items.title: Gotta Catch This One: LEGO Insiders’ Mini Pokémon Center (40911) Is Finally Here
items.description: There's a good chance that the LEGO Mini Pokémon Center will be a collector's item in future, and it's all yours for 2,500 Insiders Points.

items.title: Alexa+ Personality Upgrade Should Hopefully Make It Less Annoying

items.title: Jack Dorsey Cut 4,000 Jobs For AI And Wall Street Added $8 Billion
items.description: Block's stock surged 24% after the biggest AI-driven layoff yet. The market's reaction just created an instruction manual for every CEO in tech.
